# Player momentum comparison

## Short Teaching Summary
Player momentum comparison: The halfback and tight end have the same amount of momentum (540 kg*m/s), which is greater than the lineman's momentum (360 kg*m/s). Map connection: this idea links by example_of, requires to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
